title: Les mauvaises rencontres
writer: Jacques Laurent, Alexandre Astruc, Roland Laudenbach
actors: Jean-Claude Pascal, Anouk Aimée, Gaby Sylvia
plot: Through her answers to police inspector Corbin's questions, investigating Dr Danieli's suicide, Catherine Racan draws her self-portrait. The ambitious young journalist indeed tells how she got to Paris with Pierre, her tender love...
